heading: Establishing joint prices for through routes provided by State authorized carriers
label: 41503 Establishing joint prices for through routes provided by State authorized carriers
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)4150349 App.:1371(d) (4)(A)(ii) (related to joint rates, fares), (B)., , , § 401(d) (4)(A)(ii) (related to joint rates, fares), (B); added , , ; restated , , .Aug. 23, 1958Nov. 9, 1977Oct. 24, 1978Pub. L. 85–72672 Stat. 731Pub. L. 95–163, § 991 Stat. 1281Pub. L. 95–504, § 992 Stat. 171349 App.:1551(b)(1)(E)., , , § 1601(b)(1)(E); added , , .Aug. 23, 1958Oct. 4, 1984Pub. L. 85–72672 Stat. 731Pub. L. 98–443, § 3(e)98 Stat. 1704In this section, before clause (1), the words “Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter” are omitted as surplus. The words “a citizen of the United States providing transportation under ” are substituted for “any citizen of the United States who undertakes, within any State, the carriage of persons or property as a common carrier for compensation or hire with aircraft capable of carrying thirty or more persons pursuant to authority for such carriage within such State granted by the appropriate State agency” for clarity and because of the restatement of 49 App.:1371(d)(4)(A)(i) and (ii) (related to joint services) in section 41101(b) of the revised title. The words “the establishment of” are omitted as surplus.section 41101(b) of this title

children.text: the part of the transportation provided in the State and approved by the appropriate State authority; and

children.label: B
children.text: the part of the transportation provided by the air carrier or foreign air carrier;
